import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { useQuiz } from '../../state/QuizContext'; import { TopBar, PrimaryBtn, Badge, StatCard } from '../ui'; import { FadeUp, StaggerContainer, StaggerItem } from '../animations'; import { TESTIMONIALS, WEBINAR_OUTCOME_CARDS } from '../../data/content'; import { getZoneMessage } from '../../utils'; // ─── Social Proof Mid-Funnel ────────────────────────────────────────────────── export function SocialMidScreen() { const { next, back, progress } = useQuiz(); return (
12,000+ PEOPLE HAVE DONE THIS

These symptoms are real.
And they do go away.

{TESTIMONIALS.slice(0, 2).map((t) => (

"{t.quote}"

{t.author[0]}

 ))} Continue →
); } // ─── Outcome — What you'll get in the webinar ───────────────────────────────── export function OutcomeScreen() { const { state, next, back, progress } = useQuiz(); const zoneMsg = getZoneMessage(state.single.q_zone); return (
YOUR QUIZ RESULTS ARE READY

First I’ll show you the exact pattern behind your symptoms.

You’re answering from {zoneMsg}, which means your body is storing tension in a very specific nervous system zone. I’ll generate your report next, then show how the ₹99 live workshop is the step that actually solves it.

{WEBINAR_OUTCOME_CARDS.map((card) => (
{card.icon}

{card.title}

{card.desc}

 ))} Generate my report →
); } // ─── Dr. Valar Authority Screen ─────────────────────────────────────────────── export function AuthDrScreen() { const { next, back, progress } = useQuiz(); return (
YOUR GUIDE {/* Doctor photo placeholder — replace src with actual image */}

Dr. Valarrmathi Srinivasan

Breathwork Practitioner &
Nervous System Specialist

"The reason your symptoms keep returning is not willpower or lifestyle — it is that your nervous system is still in survival mode. Breath is the only tool that directly communicates with that system and changes it from the inside."

{[ { n: '12,000+', l: 'sessions guided' }, { n: '93%', l: 'feel shift in first session' }, ].map((s) => (

))}
